title: Fixing the City Tutorial Camera Lifecycle and Mobile Tower Dock
summary: I fixed a Phaser overlay camera lifecycle bug and removed brittle mobile tower dock assumptions from the tutorial flow.

social.bluesky_text: Fixing a Phaser overlay camera lifecycle and removing brittle mobile tower dock heuristics in City Mode onboarding. Clearer visibility rules and symmetrical intro flow improve rendering and onboarding. More details:...

The changes ensure explicit visibility and a symmetric intro/outro sequence, improving rendering and user flow. Full write-up: https://rivie13.github.io/blog/2026/06/22/fixing-city-tutorial-camera-lifecycle-mobile-tower-dock/
